name: Garden Sheds
description:
Garden sheds solve a problem most Indian homes and farms run into sooner or later: the mower, the cycles, the spades and shears, the bags of fertiliser and the half-used paint tins end up crowding the veranda, the car porch, or a corner of the yard. SAMAN's garden shed takes all of that off your living space — one ready-made 15 × 10 × 9 ft structure with a steel frame and wood finish, delivered as a finished, lockable building for ₹1,55,000.

The 15×10 ft steel-and-wood garden shed set up in a home backyard, ready for daily use.

What's included with a SAMAN garden shed

Each shed is a single configured unit, not a kit you assemble. You get a 15 × 10 ft footprint with a 9 ft ridge — 150 sq ft of covered floor — built on a treated steel frame with wood cladding and a sloped roof that sheds rain. The wood exterior gives it the warmer look most people picture when they search for wooden garden sheds for a home, while the steel frame underneath carries the load and keeps the structure square for years. It arrives with one lockable door, finished inside and out, ready the day it lands.

What you can store in a garden shed this size

Inside the 15×10 ft garden shed — a mower, cycles, hand tools and shelved pots in one place.

150 sq ft holds more than most people expect. A push or ride-on mower, two or three bicycles, a wheelbarrow, long-handled garden tools hung on the wall — and still room for shelves of pots, seed trays, and fertiliser down one side. On a farm, the same space takes pumps, sprayers, hand implements, and feed sacks. Used as a garden storage shed, it keeps everything dry, off the ground, and in one place instead of scattered across the property.

Weatherproof and lockable: built for Indian conditions

The lockable door and sealed cladding keep tools dry and secure through the monsoon.

The reason to choose steel and wood over thin plastic or bare timber is the Indian year. The frame is treated against rust so it survives the monsoon, the wood is sealed against rain, and the sloped roof carries water off rather than letting it pool. Through peak summer it stays usable — it is a ventilated store, not a sealed box, so it breathes instead of baking. The door takes a standard padlock, so tools and equipment that would be a theft target out in the open sit behind a locked, weatherproof wall.

How much does a garden shed cost in India?

A SAMAN garden shed costs ₹1,55,000 for the complete 15 × 10 ft (150 sq ft) unit — delivered, finished, and lockable, not a per-square-foot quote. Many listings advertise sheds at ₹90 to ₹290 per sq ft, but that figure usually covers only a bare structure. This price is the whole building, ready to use.

Most garden sheds for sale in India are listed as "price on request," which means a call and a wait before you even know the number. Here the figure is fixed. Building a 12 × 12 shed on site with masons often costs as much once labour, a roof, and a door are added — without the factory finish or the option to move it later.

Delivered ready-made — no on-site building

The garden shed arrives finished and is set on a level base — no on-site construction.

Because the shed is built and finished in our factory, there is no construction work at your end. The unit is dispatched within 15 to 21 working days and arrives as one ready made garden shed, lifted into position on a prepared, level spot. Transport is charged by distance — ₹80 per kilometre on a 40 ft trailer, separate from the unit price — so you know the full cost before it leaves the factory.

Garden shed or industrial shed — which do you need?

At 15×10 ft, the garden shed is sized for a home or farm — not an industrial plot.

A garden shed and an industrial shed are different products for different jobs. This 15 × 10 ft unit is a small garden shed sized for a home, farm, or compact property — tools, equipment, and outdoor storage. If you are setting up a factory, warehouse, or logistics floor and need a large clear-span structure measured in thousands of square feet, that is a different build entirely — see our industrial sheds range for spans from 9 to 50 metres. For a home or farm, the unit on this page is the right size.

Frequently asked questions

What is the cost of a 100 square feet shed in India?

It depends on whether you are quoted per square foot or for a finished unit. SAMAN's garden shed is priced as a complete 150 sq ft building at ₹1,55,000 — delivered and lockable. A 100 sq ft figure quoted at the common ₹90–₹290 per sq ft usually buys only a bare structure, not a ready-to-use shed.

Does a garden shed need a foundation, or can it sit on soil or paving?

It needs a firm, level base — a concrete pad, existing paving, or well-compacted ground all work. It does not need a deep foundation. A level surface keeps the door aligned and stops water collecting under the floor.

Will a steel garden shed rust or get too hot in summer?

The steel frame is treated against rust and the wood is sealed, so it holds up through the monsoon. It is a ventilated store rather than a closed metal box, so it does not trap heat the same way. Keep one vent clear for airflow.

Can the garden shed be moved if I relocate?

Yes. Because it is a built unit on a steel frame rather than a masonry structure, it can be lifted and shifted to a new spot or a new property. A masonry shed usually cannot be moved at all.

Get your garden shed delivered

Tell us your location and we'll confirm your price, delivery date, and transport cost.

Bangalore — Call +91 80886 85440 or WhatsApp +91 88616 22859
Delhi NCR — Call +91 87960 39938 or WhatsApp +91 97089 89937
short_description:
Garden shed — 15×10×9 ft, pre-built & lockable
Steel-and-wood garden shed for homes and farms. Delivered finished and lockable — no on-site building.
Size
15×10×9 ft · 150 sq ft
Capacity
Mower, cycles, tools
Frame
Treated steel frame
Cladding
Sealed wood cladding
Price
₹1,55,000 (fixed)
Delivery
15–21 working days
Floor
Level pad or paving
Relocations
Movable, liftable
Dispatch 15–21 working days
₹1,55,000

images.name: garden-shed-maroon-15×10-front
images.alt: Maroon steel-and-wood garden shed, 15×10 ft, with white double doors on a home lawn.

images.name: garden-shed-green-side-view
images.alt: Forest-green garden shed shown side-on with two windows along a gravel garden path.

images.name: garden-shed-orange-front
images.alt: Orange steel-and-wood garden shed with a single lockable door and two windows on a lawn.

images.name: garden-shed-cream-with-tools
images.alt: ream garden shed with brown doors and a wheelbarrow and garden tools parked outside.

images.name: garden-shed-yellow-door-window
images.alt: Yellow garden shed showing the wood cladding, glazed window and grey lockable door.
